measure_name: Cover radiator vents with storm/annealed glass
cost_unit: USD per building
notes: Urban Green "Spending Through the Roof", radiator-vent heat-loss control option. Covers ~2/3 of vents; in-house installable; best for smaller, simpler buildings.

measure_name: Install mechanical damper on radiator vents
cost_unit: USD per building
notes: Urban Green "Spending Through the Roof", radiator-vent heat-loss control option. Fully closes the vent; requires electrical power and wiring.
